rows.notes: Top-of-page title clearly written across the top; no monetary figures on this line. Lettering is legible.
Section heading directly under the title; phrase is legible and has no adjacent figures.
Columns are well aligned here. Pounds column reads '00', shillings '14', pence '6' clearly.

Description reading partly uncertain (abbrev. 'Fedij xi' is faint). Amount alignment shows small pounds and shillings zeros and a pence '4' in the pence column; the shillings column looks blank/zero. Chosen reading based on clear small '4' in the pence column.
Description reads as 'Mayrs Capons' (mayor's capons). Numeric columns show '00 | 12 | 6' clearly; handwriting of description slightly irregular but legible.

Description repeats a college abbreviation; text somewhat cramped. Amounts read in columns as '00 | 08 | 2' though the tens stroke of the '8' is faint; chosen reading due to alignment with ruling guides.
Description (abbreviated Latin) is partially faded but readable as 'Coll. Omn: primare'. Amounts align to '00 | 12 | 4' fairly clearly; slight ink irregularity on the shillings digit.
College of St. John Baptist abbreviation is legible. Amount appears as '00 | 03 | 4' with clear pence and shillings digits.
Description 'Coll. Baliol' is clear. The adjacent amount columns show '00 | 12 | 4', though the shillings digit is a little crowded under a ruling; chosen by alignment with previous rows.

Description is irregular (handwritten Latinized phrase) and partly faded; interpreted as 'Curia Hogstines up Biennio'. Amount looks small in the columns and appears as '00 | 03 | 4' though there is some ink smudge near these figures causing uncertainty.
Description for 'Procurat. Cudlingt, Southn. Merton & ...' is partly crossed but readable. Amount columns read '01 | 19 | 0' fairly clearly; the crossing out does not affect the numerals.
The word 'Janitor' is legible. Right-side columns read '01 | 14 | 8' without ambiguity.
Short description 'Cogno' (handwritten) is faint but plausible. Numeric columns read '01 | 10 | 8'; the pence '8' is slightly smudged but aligns well with column.

Description unclear (reads 'Lotrici' or similar). Amount appears as '02 | 00 | 8' — the '02' in pounds is readable, but the pence '8' and placement are somewhat uncertain due to light ink and shadow from the page fold.
Description 'Tonsori' (barbers) is legible. Right-hand figures read '00 | 13 | 4' clearly; alignment with ruling lines is consistent.
Entry 'Bibliothecario' is readable. Amounts read '00 | 13 | 4' matching the preceding line spacing; digits are clear.
Description 'Bibliothecario non Graduat.' is legible though slightly cramped. Amount columns indicate '01 | 03 | 0' — the pence '0' is visible as a small zero; pounds and shillings readable.
Handwritten phrase reads 'Bedle of Beggars' (beadle). Right-hand numerals read '01 | 06 | 8' clearly; ink darker here giving confidence.
Long description is legible. Amount columns show a larger figure '04 | 00 | 00' (4 pounds), which is clear and well aligned with the totaling line.
Description readable though compact. Amount reads '01 | 00 | 00' clearly; the text has slight ink thinness causing moderate uncertainty.

Description is highly uncertain (part of the line is rubbed/overwritten). The adjacent numeral is large and reads as '20 | 00 | 00' — interpreted as twenty pounds; this is unusually large and the handwriting is ambiguous, so confidence is low. (Could be 'Corne prices' belongs to this large figure; placement is ambiguous.)
Description 'Consecration Sermon' appears but is faint. Nearby figures read '00 | 02 | 00' though there is some uncertainty about exact horizontal alignment of this amount with this description.

Description is long and partly abbreviated; reads as 'Curate of Southn. Ann. 10th Mich 10th'. Numeric columns read '01 | 00 | 00' but some ink fading and cramped script make the association moderately uncertain.

Description 'Corne prices' is readable but small. The nearby number cluster is fuzzy: I read a small value '00 | 01 | 10' (1s.10d) but spacing is tight and there are other larger numbers on adjacent lines; chosen reading with low confidence.
Line reads as 'Synodalls Cudlingt. Southn. Merton' (abbreviated). The numeric alignment suggests '00 | 02 | 00' but the digits are small and there is ink variation; moderate confidence.

Description is heavily abbreviated and partly illegible (looks like 'Prison {Castle ... Bocardo ...}'). I matched it to a nearby '01 | 00 | 00' amount; both text and amount alignment are uncertain due to faded ink and cramped abbreviations.
Short entry 'Pauperibus' readable. Associated amount in the right columns appears '00 | 02 | 00' though the tens digit is faint; moderate confidence.
Final line before total reads as 'Bibliorum Lectori' (or similar). Adjacent figures read '00 | 02 | 00' with reasonably clear small digits; description letters are slightly stylized but legible.
Bottom summed total line clearly underlined and reads '45 | 5 | 10'. Numerals are bold and aligned with the pounds/shillings/pence columns; high confidence in these total figures.
